title: specify brief frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block at the top of every brief markdown file under `schemas/*/briefs/**/*.md`. Briefs describe individual skill steps that a schema's pipeline runs; the frontmatter declares identity, narrative, and graph edges (`needs`, `generates`, `tracks`). The JSON Schema applies to the YAML between the opening and closing `---` delimiters, not the markdown body.

id.description: Stable identifier for this brief. Referenced by `needs` in sibling briefs and by `pipeline.*` entries in the owning `schema.yaml`.

description.description: One-sentence summary of what the brief produces or does. Surfaced to operators when listing pipeline steps.

needs.description: Briefs whose outputs this brief consumes. Forms the pipeline DAG: a brief cannot run until every `needs` entry has completed.

generates.description: Output path (optionally glob-shaped) produced by running this brief. Consumed by downstream briefs via `needs` + filesystem convention.

tracks.description: Identifier of an artefact this brief iterates over (e.g. `tasks` for a build brief). Signals that progress is measured per-item rather than once-per-brief.
